client_construction.code: c, err := mongo.Connect(context.Background(), options.Client().ApplyURI(uri)); if err != nil { return nil, err }; coll := c.Database("app").Collection("entities")

primary_operations.name: FindById
primary_operations.sdk_call: var e Entity; err := r.coll.FindOne(context.Background(), bson.M{"_id": id}).Decode(&e); return e, err

primary_operations.name: Delete
primary_operations.sdk_call: _, err := r.coll.DeleteOne(context.Background(), bson.M{"_id": id}); return err

code_style_notes: mongo.ErrNoDocuments is the standard 'no doc matched' sentinel
Connect is fire-and-forget; first IO operation triggers actual TCP connection
